name: Studio Delay
explanation: A pristine rackmount digital delay. A fractionally-interpolated stereo delay line gives crystal-clear echoes that decay smoothly; feedback regenerates the repeats (bounded near maximum so it never runs away), an optional gentle modulation adds subtle movement, a high/low damping filter darkens or brightens each repeat, and a stereo width control offsets the left/right taps for a wide image. Controls: Time, Feedback, Modulation, Damping, Width and dry/wet Mix.
